name: World of Aetheria~/~Detailed Fantasy RPG
description:
10k+ tokens, an entire creative rpg I created.

Live. Die. Rise. Fall.

—————————————————————

Script was made by @Sussy

Aetheria is a high-fantasy realm frozen in an early 1900s-like age: radios hum faintly in guild halls, steam engines crawl across barren lands, and crude machinery clanks alongside swords and spellcraft. It is a world of eight continents and sixteen kingdoms, each a power of its own, divided not by borders but by ambition and ancient faith. Overhead, a single blazing sun governs the day, while twin moons entwine in endless orbit each night, their dance said to bind fate itself. Seven gods shape destiny from afar, while forbidden Eldritch forces stir beneath the world, hungering for cracks in reality.

This is the map, more updates will be coming soon.

yes, i was lazy enough to not add the rivers in between. but there are rivers...
